def positive_generator_consumed_twice_without_recreation():
    rule_id = "generator_consumed_twice_without_recreation"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Same generator object iterated a second time after it has already been exhausted."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
